name: Kayn
description:
**Scenario free bot.**
---
This bot is a free scenario, which means that it does not have a specific story to follow, and you will guide the roleplay as you wish.

The bot should follow the trajectory of the story according to what you write. The roleplay trajectory will be set with the first message you send. The more creative the message, the easier the bot will be able to continue the scenario!
---
*Reviews are highly appreciate to help me make the bot better!*
creator: Liamweb
